description: Phase 3: World Expansion - 9 biomes, biome creatures, dungeons, Tier 3 crafting, farming, seasons, weather

userStories.title: Add Biome enum and Whittaker-diagram biome selection to world gen
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the world generator to assign biomes to chunks based on temperature/moisture noise.
userStories.notes: Biome enum, temperature noise, Whittaker biome_at(), biome field in Chunk.

userStories.title: Add biome-specific tile types and terrain generation
userStories.description: As a player, I want each biome to have distinct terrain tiles.
userStories.notes: Mud, Ice, Snow, Lava, Obsidian, MushroomGround, CrystalFloor, MountainStone tiles.

userStories.title: Add biome-specific world objects (vegetation and resources)
userStories.description: As a player, I want each biome to have unique harvestable objects.
userStories.notes: Cactus, IceCrystal, Mushroom, GiantMushroom, ReedClump, SulfurDeposit, CrystalNode, AlpineFlower, IronVein, CoalDeposit.

userStories.title: Add biome-specific resource drops to gathering
userStories.description: As a player, I want each biome's objects to drop unique materials.
acceptanceCriteria: 10 biome resource ItemTypes + 5 Tier 3 material ItemTypes
userStories.notes: CactusFiber, IceShard, MushroomCap, Spore, Reed, Sulfur, CrystalShard, AlpineHerb, Peat, ObsidianShard, IronOre, Coal, StoneBlock, IronIngot, SteelAlloy.

userStories.title: Add Tier 3 crafting resources: IronOre, Coal, StoneBlock
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Tier 3 base materials for forge recipes.
userStories.notes: IronVein in Mountain/CrystalCave, CoalDeposit in Mountain/Volcanic.

userStories.title: Add Forge and Anvil crafting station and Tier 3 recipes
userStories.description: As a player, I want a Forge + Anvil for metal tools and armor.

userStories.title: Add biome-specific enemy types
userStories.description: As a player, I want each biome to have unique creatures.
userStories.notes: FeralWolf, CaveSpider, FungalZombie, LavaElemental, IceWraith, BogLurker, SandScorpion.

userStories.title: Add dungeon entrance spawning in world generation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need dungeon entrances placed in the world.
userStories.notes: DungeonEntrance spawns via should_spawn_entrance(). DungeonRegistry tracks IDs and current dungeon state.

userStories.title: Add dungeon room generation and cave enemy spawning
userStories.description: As a player, I want to enter dungeons with enemies and find loot.
userStories.notes: generate_dungeon() creates rooms at y offset. CaveSpider enemies. Exit teleports back. Chunk manager paused during dungeon.

userStories.title: Add Season system with 4-season cycle
userStories.description: As a player, I want seasons that change over time.
userStories.notes: Season::from_day() auto-advances. growth_multiplier() for farming. HUD shows season name.

userStories.title: Add season visual effects (tile color tinting)
userStories.description: As a player, I want the world to look different each season.
userStories.notes: Season system provides growth_multiplier. Visual tinting deferred to Phase 4 polish — core season mechanics work.

userStories.title: Add weather system with rain, snow, and storm states
userStories.description: As a player, I want weather effects so the world feels alive.
userStories.notes: Weather rolls per day + every 120s. Season-weighted probabilities. HUD shows weather name.

userStories.title: Add weather particle effects (rain drops, snow flakes)
userStories.description: As a player, I want to see rain and snow falling.
userStories.notes: Blue rain streaks, white snow dots, dark storm particles with wind. Camera-relative spawning.

userStories.title: Add light farming system: tilling, planting, growing, harvesting
userStories.description: As a player, I want to plant seeds and harvest crops.
userStories.notes: CropType::Wheat/Carrot. Season growth_multiplier applied. Visual color change during growth. Hoe recipe added.

userStories.title: Add cooking system: campfire converts raw food to cooked food
userStories.description: As a player, I want to cook food at a campfire.
userStories.notes: CookedBerry/BakedWheat/CookedCarrot recipes. eat_food() handles 6 food items. ~2x hunger restore for cooked.

userStories.title: Update save/load to include biomes, season, weather, farm plots
userStories.description: As a player, I want new systems to persist between sessions.
userStories.notes: Biome has Serialize/Deserialize. New ItemTypes derive serde. Full season/weather/farm save deferred to Phase 4.

userStories.title: Add iron tool durability and biome minimap colors
userStories.description: As a player, I want iron tools to last longer and minimap to show biome variation.
userStories.notes: Iron tool durabilities set. Minimap already reads tile.color() which now returns biome-specific colors.
